scripts.dev: npm run dev:call & npm run dev:dashboard & wait
scripts.build: npm -w @dawood/call run build && npm -w @dawood/dashboard run build
scripts.typecheck: npm -w @dawood/call run typecheck && npm -w @dawood/dashboard run typecheck
scripts.lint: npm -w @dawood/call run lint && npm -w @dawood/dashboard run lint
